message:
test(e2e): refactor ensemble stream test home directory setup

Extract common HOME directory setup into streamHome helper function
to reduce test boilerplate and ensure consistent test isolation:

- Add sync import for potential future thread-safe operations
- Replace inline t.TempDir()/t.Setenv pattern with streamHome(t)
- Apply to TestEnsembleSynthesizeStreamJSONL and
  TestEnsembleSynthesizeStreamResumeJSONL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
